verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will serve thee because I love thee You have given life to me I was nothing before you found me You have given life to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Heartaches broken pieces Ruined lives are why you died on Calvary Your touch was what I longed for You have given life to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will serve thee because I love thee You have given life to me I was nothing before you found me You have given life to me
